result.text: {"answer_label":"drop-exit-code","answer":"Drop it before the schema freeze: it does not report an actual process outcome and risks misleading consumers.","contradiction_caught":null,"contradiction_explanation":"","minority_finding":"Keeping it could avoid a later breaking addition if graders gain exit-code data, but no shipped grader currently supplies that signal.","evidence":["The field is hardcoded to 0 for scored results and null otherwise, regardless of what ran.","Removing it before the stable freeze requires no compatibility handling."]}
